name: test_post_create_user_id_is_string
description:
POST /users — ReqRes returns 'id' as a STRING (not int).
        This is a known quirk — schema enforces it explicitly.
        In a real app, id would likely be an integer.
descriptionHtml:
POST /users — ReqRes returns 'id' as a STRING (not int).
    This is a known quirk — schema enforces it explicitly.
    In a real app, id would likely be an integer.
statusTrace:
tests/test_schema_validation.py:119: in test_post_create_user_id_is_string
    assert isinstance(body["id"], str), (
E   KeyError: 'id'
